results.title: HKSAR V. C.H.P. AND OTHERS

results.parties: BETWEEN HKSAR Respondent and C.H.P. (D1) 1 st Applicant W.H.T. (D2) 2 nd Applicant G.M. (D3) 3 rd Applicant
